free_text: Nuclear structure of 187W studied with (n,gamma)
and (d, p) reactions
preliminary results for levels
in 187W till 2.2 MeV
the LWR-15 reactor at Rez near Prague.
The enriched sample (99.8%) of about 1.1 g
Two single spectra were measured with both detectors
simultaneously, one in the energy range 0 - 2.35 MeV,
and another between 0 and 5.9 MeV. The relative
intensity of the 187W spectra was converted into
absolute units using activation lines from the
following  beta-decay to 187Re
thermal neutrons from the neutron guide with
the flux on the target position of about
3 x 10**6 n/cm2/s at a reactor power of 8 MW.
two HPGe detectors (25% detector with a
resolution of 2 keV (FWHM) at 60Co lines and about 5
keV at 5-6 MeV and a 20% detector with approximately
the same resolution.) For both detectors the
relative efficiency and energy calibration was made
relative to the reaction 35Cl(n,gamma) and with the
radioactive sources 152Eu and 133Ba.
Data were received from Dr. V.Bondarenko
